channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Xi Jinping To Meet Kim Jong Un: Why It Matters And What To Expect

media:content.media:description: Xi's visit will be his first foreign trip this year.

item.description: China's President Xi Jinping will visit North Korea on Monday as he seeks to cement Beijing's influence in its own backyard.
item.content:encoded: China's President Xi Jinping will visit North Korea on Monday as he seeks to cement Beijing's influence in its own backyard.

item.title: Trump Sees Win As US Senate Approves $70 Billion For Immigration Crackdown

media:content.media:description: The package follows a record partial shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security.

item.description: The bill would fund ICE and Border Patrol through the rest of Trump's term, handing the Republican leader a major victory on one of his signature issues.
item.content:encoded: The bill would fund ICE and Border Patrol through the rest of Trump's term, handing the Republican leader a major victory on one of his signature issues.

item.title: US Realtor And Her Daughters Killed By Ex-Husband In Suspected Murder-Suicide

media:content.media:description: Doral Mayor Christi Fraga expressed grief over the incident.

item.description: The outlet also reported that Hyer and Whiten were no longer together but had been co-parenting their daughters before their deaths.
item.content:encoded: The outlet also reported that Hyer and Whiten were no longer together but had been co-parenting their daughters before their deaths.

item.title: India, Norway Seal Green Partnership, Maritime Deals in PM Modi's Oslo Visit

media:content.media:description: Norway's Ambassador to India called the visit "very successful"

item.description: In an exclusive interview to NDTV, Norway's Ambassador to India, May-Elin Stener, called the visit "very successful" and pointed to a sweep of concrete outcomes that she said would define the partnership for years to come.
item.content:encoded: In an exclusive interview to NDTV, Norway's Ambassador to India, May-Elin Stener, called the visit "very successful" and pointed to a sweep of concrete outcomes that she said would define the partnership for years to come.

item.title: ChatGPT Is 'Dreaming' To Cure Its Digital Amnesia

media:content.media:description: The new feature will roll out to all Free tier users over the coming weeks

item.description: OpenAI's new background architecture stops the chatbot from forgetting your life-and it's coming to the free tier.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's new background architecture stops the chatbot from forgetting your life-and it's coming to the free tier.

item.title: Putin Offers Su-57 Fighter To Delhi As India Searches Its 5th-Gen Jet

media:content.media:description: India's hesitation is rooted in both operational and strategic calculations

item.description: The Su-57, developed by Russia's Sukhoi Design Bureau, is designed to carry out a wide range of combat missions, including engagement of air, ground and maritime targets.
item.content:encoded: The Su-57, developed by Russia's Sukhoi Design Bureau, is designed to carry out a wide range of combat missions, including engagement of air, ground and maritime targets.

item.title: US-Iran Live Updates: "Would Be Honoured To Meet": Trump On Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei

media:content.media:description: US-Iran War Live: The US said that it had "successfully defeated" a series of Iranian missile attacks.

item.description: US-Iran War Live: Iran fired missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain hours after US conducted strikes on Iran's Qeshm Island amid ongoing peace talks between Washington and Tehran.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War Live: Iran fired missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain hours after US conducted strikes on Iran's Qeshm Island amid ongoing peace talks between Washington and Tehran.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Panic In Silicon Valley: Why 15,000 Indians Fled US Last Year - With More On Their Way
item.description: More than 15,000 Indian tech professionals returned home from the US in 2025, and 7,300 have already returned this year, driven by layoffs, visa denials, and a job market that's fast becoming a nightmare.
item.content:encoded: More than 15,000 Indian tech professionals returned home from the US in 2025, and 7,300 have already returned this year, driven by layoffs, visa denials, and a job market that's fast becoming a nightmare.

item.title: How H-1B Curbs Are Affecting The Texas Real Estate Market

media:content.media:description: A wave of H-1B restrictions is pushing Indian buyers out of housing market

item.description: A wave of H-1B restrictions and AI-related tech layoffs is pushing Indian buyers out of the housing market.
item.content:encoded: A wave of H-1B restrictions and AI-related tech layoffs is pushing Indian buyers out of the housing market.

item.title: Pentagon Hires Man Convicted In January 6 Riot For National Security Job

media:content.media:description: Elias Irizarry was 19-years-old during the events at the US Capitol on January 6, 2021.

item.description: Elias Irizarry, was 19-years-old during the events at the US Capitol on January 6, 2021.
item.content:encoded: Elias Irizarry, was 19-years-old during the events at the US Capitol on January 6, 2021.

item.title: 'Give Me Last Chance': Indian Man Caught Grooming 14-Year-Old In UK
item.description: When confronted, the Indian man accepted sending sexually explicit texts to the girl, despite knowing she was 14 years old.
item.content:encoded: When confronted, the Indian man accepted sending sexually explicit texts to the girl, despite knowing she was 14 years old.

item.title: Videos of People Descending Into NYC Sewers Spark Investigation

media:content.media:description: A man is seen lifting the heavy manhole cover while a nearby vehicle light up the area with headlights.

item.description: Aki Jakupovic, who owns an auto detailing shop in the area, was working overnight when he noticed three men dressed in waders approaching a nearby manhole.
item.content:encoded: Aki Jakupovic, who owns an auto detailing shop in the area, was working overnight when he noticed three men dressed in waders approaching a nearby manhole.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Trump's 'Forced Labour' Tariff Charge May Really Be About Something Else
item.description: After the US Supreme Court curtailed the use of emergency powers for reciprocal tariffs, the Trump administration is searching for firmer legal ground.
item.content:encoded: After the US Supreme Court curtailed the use of emergency powers for reciprocal tariffs, the Trump administration is searching for firmer legal ground.

item.title: 'MAGA Whisperer' Hunter Biden Is A Social Media Star And He's Joking About Crack, Trump And 2028 Election

media:content.media:description: Hunter Biden claps back at critics on X, discussing sobriety and joking about presidential run.

item.description: Joe Biden's troubled son, Hunter Biden, has become an overnight internet star with a series of attention-grabbing social media posts.
item.content:encoded: Joe Biden's troubled son, Hunter Biden, has become an overnight internet star with a series of attention-grabbing social media posts.

item.title: Rajasthan To London Council Seat: Tracking Indian Man's Rise In UK Politics

media:content.media:description: Rathore had earlier worked in campaigning for Boris Johnson and Rishi Sunak

item.description: Ranjeet Singh Rathore has been elected as a councillor from the North Hillingdon seat, a quiet, upscale residential area in West London's Hillingdon Borough.
item.content:encoded: Ranjeet Singh Rathore has been elected as a councillor from the North Hillingdon seat, a quiet, upscale residential area in West London's Hillingdon Borough.

item.title: 'Pressuring PM Modi To Limit Ties With Russia Harms Global Relations': Putin

media:content.media:description: Putin also expressed confidence that Russia's economic ties with India would continue to expand

item.description: The Russian leader also said that Moscow would continue to deepen ties with India despite geopolitical tensions surrounding the country's global engagements.
item.content:encoded: The Russian leader also said that Moscow would continue to deepen ties with India despite geopolitical tensions surrounding the country's global engagements.

item.title: Xi Jinping To Visit North Korea Next Week, First Visit Since 2019

media:content.media:description: Chinese President Xi Jinping and North Korean leader Kim Jong Un in Beijing, China (file)

item.description: Pyongyang will be Xi's first overseas visit this year. He last travelled internationally in late October when he went to South Korea, where he also met Trump.
item.content:encoded: Pyongyang will be Xi's first overseas visit this year. He last travelled internationally in late October when he went to South Korea, where he also met Trump.

item.title: "PM Modi A Good Friend": Trump's Big Remark On India-US Trade Deal

media:content.media:description: A US delegation was in India earlier this week for negotiations on an interim bilateral agreement.

item.description: Responding to a question on the trade deal negotiation, Trump alleged India had taken advantage of US policies for years and charged tremendous tariffs, and his policies are just reversing that.
item.content:encoded: Responding to a question on the trade deal negotiation, Trump alleged India had taken advantage of US policies for years and charged tremendous tariffs, and his policies are just reversing that.

item.title: 'Heard Good Things': Trump Says He'd Be "Honoured" To Meet Iran's Mojtaba Khamenei
item.description: The US leader also said that he would be "honoured" to meet Iran's new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, if a deal is reached between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: The US leader also said that he would be "honoured" to meet Iran's new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, if a deal is reached between the two countries.

item.title: Nepal Foreign Minister On 3-Day India Visit To Reset Ties Amid Boundary Row

media:content.media:description: Analysts see the visit as a course correction driven by mutual necessity.

item.description: Shisir Khanal's New Delhi trip carries unmistakable diplomatic weight, signalling Kathmandu's intent to move past the friction and re-engage New Delhi at the highest levels.
item.content:encoded: Shisir Khanal's New Delhi trip carries unmistakable diplomatic weight, signalling Kathmandu's intent to move past the friction and re-engage New Delhi at the highest levels.
